creator: stanislav@icmail.ru
text:
Good day!
After updating ports collections and the beginnings of update of the program ksysguard during archive downloading on the console the error report is deduced:

kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/KDE.
=> Attempting to fetch http://mirrors.isc.org/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2
fetch: http://mirrors.isc.org/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 69243093, actual 69241659
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.gtlib.cc.gatech.edu/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2
fetch: ftp://ftp.gtlib.cc.gatech.edu/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 69243093, actual 69241659
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.informatik.hu-berlin.de/pub/Mirrors/ftp.kde.org/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2
fetch: ftp://ftp.informatik.hu-berlin.de/pub/Mirrors/ftp.kde.org/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2: Protocol error
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.gtlib.cc.gatech.edu/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2
fetch: http://ftp.gtlib.cc.gatech.edu/pub/kde/stable/4.6.5/src//kdebase-workspace-4.6.5.tar.bz2: size mismatch: expected 69243093, actual 69241659
